subcodes.first_line: O Joseph of conscience! The time hath come when thou shalt ascend from the depths of the well unto the heights of the moon, and find deliverance from imprisonment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یوسف وجدانی زمان آن آمد که از قعر چاه باوج ماه رسی از زندان رهاای یابی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
